hooks.command: jq -e 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("project\\.pbxproj$") then halt_error("project.pbxproj is generated by XcodeGen. Edit project.yml + run `xcodegen generate` instead.") else . end' >/dev/null

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^|[;&|(]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*gh pr create' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CLAUDE.md freshness gate: before creating this PR, review the full branch diff (git diff main...HEAD) for anything CLAUDE.md should document - new features/screens, new RULEs or gotchas, new @AppStorage keys (SettingsKeys.swift), new files for the Project Structure tree, changed defaults. Update CLAUDE.md on this branch BEFORE running gh pr create. If CLAUDE.md is already up to date for this diff, proceed."}}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '/project\.yml$' && (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && xcodegen generate >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'xcodegen: project regenerated' >&2) || true

command -v swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""') && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.swift$' && (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && swiftlint lint --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -40 >&2) || true
